text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper title and authors (Sukriti Jaitly, Tanay Shah, et al.) are real, but the cited arXiv ID is wrong. The correct arXiv ID is **2312.12464**, not 2309.00722 as cited. The cited ID (2309.00722) points to an entirely different paper about quasinormal modes of loop quantum black holes, confirming the reference metadata contains a fabricated/incorrect arXiv identifier.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.12464
